description: Hidden gems and trending spots from H2 2025 / 2026

description.en: French home-style bakery hidden in a Seoul Forest alley. Famous for quiche and pavlova that sell out daily. Opened to instant hype with waits from day one.
description.ko: 서울숲 앞 골목의 프랑스 가정식 베이커리. 키슈와 파블로바가 매일 품절되는 핫플.

best_times.en: Weekday mornings 11 AM-1 PM before sellout

tips: Arrive early as popular items sell out by afternoon
Must-try: quiche and pavlova
Small space so expect waits on weekends

description.en: Antique-styled cafe specializing in French beignets. The crispy dough with soft filling and lemon cream latte have made it Seongsu's most Instagrammed bakery of 2025.
description.ko: 프랑스식 베녜 전문 앤틱 감성 카페. 바삭한 도우와 레몬크림라떼로 성수동 인스타 1위.

tips: Try the signature beignet with cream filling
Lemon cream latte is a must-order
Antique interior is great for photos

description.en: Minimalist espresso bar near Ttukseom Station that became an instant coffee-lover destination. Focused menu makes espresso accessible with creative milk-based drinks.
description.ko: 뚝섬역 앞 미니멀한 에스프레소 바. 오픈과 동시에 커피 맛집으로 유명세를 탄 곳.

tips: Focused on espresso-based drinks
Minimalist concrete-and-wood interior
Great for a quick quality coffee stop

description.en: Adidas concept cafe in Seongsu opened Oct 2025. Art space and community hub with 50+ menu items including logo-inspired cakes, matcha scones, and protein smoothies.
description.ko: 2025년 10월 성수에 오픈한 아디다스 콘셉트 카페. 로고 케이크, 말차 스콘, 프로틴 스무디 등 50가지 메뉴.

tips: Logo-inspired cakes make for great photos
Sporty smoothies with superfood boosts are surprisingly good
Also functions as an art gallery space

description.en: Where concrete meets wood in the heart of Seongsu. A hip specialty roaster with bright acidity coffees and a design-forward space beloved by Seoul's creative set.
description.ko: 성수동 심장부의 힙한 스페셜티 로스터리. 산미 살아있는 커피와 디자인 공간.

tips: Ask about their single-origin pour-overs
The concrete-and-wood interior is unique
Popular with local photographers and designers

description.en: A Yeonnam-dong hidden gem serving signature dirty cream coffee and heavy butter pastries. Retro interior with pastries in chocolate, strawberry, and matcha flavors.
description.ko: 연남동 숨은 카페. 더티크림커피와 헤비버터 페이스트리가 시그니처. 레트로 인테리어.

tips: Must-try: dirty cream coffee
Heavy butter pastry is their viral item
Retro decor is very photogenic

description.en: Minimalist Yeonnam-dong cafe for serious coffee drinkers. Filter coffee lineup changes regularly so you never drink the same cup twice. Beautiful natural light.
description.ko: 연남동 미니멀 카페. 필터커피 라인업이 수시로 바뀌어 매번 새로운 한 잔. 자연광이 아름다운 공간.

best_times.en: Morning 10 AM-12 PM for best light

tips: Ask what filter coffee is on today
Very small space — go on weekdays
Perfect for a slow morning along the forest path

description.en: Opens at 8:30 AM with freshly baked bread. A croissant and Americano on the terrace facing the Gyeongui Line Forest Path — the quintessential Yeonnam morning.
description.ko: 아침 8시 30분 오픈, 갓 구운 빵과 숲길 테라스 모닝. 연남동의 정수를 담은 카페.

tips: Croissant (5,000 won) + Americano (5,500 won) on the terrace
Opens early at 8:30 AM
Terrace faces the forest path — best in spring/autumn

description.en: Mangwon's viral bakery known for mammoth bread — gooey mochi inside crunchy cookie crumbles in wild flavors. Lines form daily but worth the wait.
description.ko: 망원동 바이럴 베이커리. 쫀득한 모찌와 쿠키 크럼블의 매머드빵으로 매일 줄서는 곳.

tips: Mammoth bread is the must-try item
Flavors rotate — ask what's fresh
Weekdays have shorter lines

description.en: An LP cafe in Mangwon offering a relaxing afternoon of music and coffee. Gigantic speakers, curated vinyl collections, and limited seating create an intimate listening experience.
description.ko: 망원동 LP 카페. 거대한 스피커와 큐레이션된 바이닐 컬렉션으로 음악을 즐기는 공간.

tips: Limited seats — go on weekdays to guarantee a spot
Bring headphones if you want personal listening
Great pairing of coffee and curated music

description.en: Mangwon specialty coffee roastery where baristas' passion is palpable. A space to slow down and savor each cup, away from the rush of trendier neighborhoods.
description.ko: 망원동 스페셜티 커피 로스터리. 바리스타의 열정이 느껴지는, 천천히 커피를 음미하는 공간.

tips: Ask for their recommended single-origin
Very local crowd — few tourists here
Pair with a Mangwon Market stroll

description.en: A speakeasy bar disguised as a shoe repair shop in Seongsu-dong. Push the cobbler's workbench next to the antique clock to reveal a hidden door into a full cocktail bar.
description.ko: 성수동 구둣방으로 위장한 스피크이지 바. 벽시계 옆 작업대를 밀면 비밀의 문이 열리는 칵테일 바.

tips: Look for the shoe repair shop facade
Push the workbench near the wall clock to enter
Craft cocktails only — no beer on tap

description.en: Seoul's most iconic speakeasy. Hidden behind a bookshelf in Gangnam — press a secret button to enter. Featured in Asia's Best Bars 2025 list.
description.ko: 강남 책장 뒤에 숨겨진 시크릿 바. 버튼을 눌러야 입장. 2025 아시아 베스트 바 선정.

tips: Look for the bookshelf with a hidden button
Reservations recommended on weekends
Named in Asia's Best Bars 2025

description.en: Ranked #2 in Asia's Best Bars 2025. A zero-waste cocktail bar using soju as a base with Korean-inspired drinks like hwachae cocktails. Sustainability meets Seoul nightlife.
description.ko: 2025 아시아 베스트 바 2위. 소주 기반 제로웨이스트 칵테일 바. 화채 콘셉트 메뉴가 특징.

tips: Try their soju-based signature cocktails
Zero-waste concept — each ingredient is fully used
Ranked #2 in Asia — reservations essential

description.en: 11F rooftop bar at JW Marriott Dongdaemun with panoramic night views. Signature 'Dongdaemun Moonlight' cocktail comes with edible perfume — drink it while inhaling the scent.
description.ko: JW 메리어트 동대문 11층 루프탑바. 시그니처 '동대문 달빛' 칵테일은 식용 향수와 함께 제공.

address.en: 11F, JW Marriott Dongdaemun Square Seoul, Jung-gu, Seoul
address.ko: 서울 중구 JW 메리어트 동대문 스퀘어 서울 11층

best_times.en: Sunset hours and after 9 PM for night views
best_times.ko: 일몰 시간대 및 밤 9시 이후 야경

tips: Order the Dongdaemun Moonlight cocktail with edible perfume
Window seats have the best DDP views
Smart casual dress code

description.en: 15F rooftop bar at Hotel RYSE in Hongdae. Brooklyn-inspired nightlife vibes with a stylish lounge interior and outdoor terrace overlooking Seoul's indie music district.
description.ko: 홍대 호텔 라이즈 15층 루프탑바. 브루클린 감성의 라운지와 테라스에서 인디 뮤직 거리를 내려다보는 곳.

tips: Outdoor terrace is magical on warm evenings
Brooklyn-meets-Seoul vibe
Good DJ sets on weekends

description.en: The anchor cafe of Songjeong-dong, Seoul's next hidden cafe neighborhood. A converted house with 3 floors and rooftop, 30+ coffee varieties, and views over Jungnangcheon stream.
description.ko: 서울의 새로운 숨은 카페거리 송정동의 대표 카페. 개조한 주택 3층+옥상, 30종 이상 커피, 중랑천 뷰.

tips: Songjeong-dong is called 'the next Seongsu' — visit before it gets famous
Songjeong Cream Latte is the signature drink
Rooftop has nice Jungnangcheon stream views

description.en: A former pharmaceutical building in quiet Huam-dong converted into a multi-floor experience: 1F accessories shop + cafe, 2F exhibition space, 3F restaurant, 4F rooftop with Namsan views.
description.ko: 후암동의 옛 제약회사 건물을 개조한 복합 카페. 1층 소품샵+카페, 2층 전시, 3층 레스토랑, 4층 루프탑.

tips: Huam-dong is behind Seoul Station — barely any tourists
Rooftop has lovely Namsan views
Check the 2F exhibition before heading to the 3F restaurant

description.en: A specialty coffee spot tucked in the quiet slopes of Huam-dong behind Seoul Station. One of the neighborhood's pioneer cafes that helped put this sleepy area on the map.
description.ko: 서울역 뒤편 후암동 조용한 언덕길의 스페셜티 커피. 이 동네의 개척자 카페 중 하나.

tips: Huam-dong is one of Seoul's last undiscovered neighborhoods
Combine with a walk up to Namsan
Cash or card accepted

description.en: An Euljiro listening LP bar between Euljiro 3-ga and Chungmuro. Rich, warm vinyl sound fills the space as vintage and classic moods blend in this retro hideaway.
description.ko: 을지로3가와 충무로 사이 리스닝 LP바. 빈티지와 클래식을 넘나드는 따뜻한 바이닐 사운드.

address.en: Between Euljiro 3-ga and Chungmuro, Jung-gu, Seoul

tips: Perfect for a mellow evening of vinyl listening
Drinks are secondary to the music experience
Located in Euljiro's industrial alley charm zone

description.en: Authentic Thai restaurant in Yeonnam-dong serving tom yum kung and pad thai that rival Bangkok street stalls. A local favorite for affordable, punchy Southeast Asian flavors.
description.ko: 연남동 태국 현지의 맛 그대로 담은 똠얌꿍과 팟타이 전문점. 저렴하고 강렬한 동남아 맛.

best_times.en: Lunch 11:30 AM-1:30 PM or dinner 6-8 PM

tips: Tom yum kung is the must-order
Small space so arrive before peak hours
Cash and card accepted

description.en: 40-year-old institution serving golbaengi-muchim (spicy sea snail salad) and somaek (soju-beer mix). The quintessential Euljiro 'nopojangs' (old-school eatery) experience.
description.ko: 40년 전통 골뱅이무침과 소맥 한잔이 완벽한 을지로 노포. 진짜 을지로 감성.

tips: Order golbaengi-muchim and somaek — the classic combo
40 years old and still going strong
Authentic blue-collar Euljiro atmosphere

description.en: A concept cafe with fake rain falling outside the window — the 'rain view' cafe that went viral on Korean social media. Specialty croissants and Instagram-perfect rainy ambiance.
description.ko: 창밖에 인공 비가 내리는 콘셉트 카페. SNS에서 바이럴된 '비 뷰' 카페와 스페셜티 크루아상.

tips: The fake rain outside the window is mesmerizing
Croissants are the specialty
Extremely popular — weekday visits recommended

description.en: A small cultural island in the middle of the Han River that has become a sunset favorite on TikTok. Live music events, a plant cafe, and 360-degree river views.
description.ko: 한강 한가운데 작은 문화섬. TikTok에서 일몰 핫스팟으로 떠오르며 라이브 음악과 식물 카페가 인기.

tips: Go for sunset — it's TikTok famous for a reason
Check for live music events on weekends
The plant cafe is worth a visit too
